description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a tall, padded headboard and a low-profile footboard. The bed is dressed in a thick, white comforter that drapes over the sides, with two large, plush pillows propped up against the headboard. The frame appears to be upholstered, giving it a soft and inviting look, while the bedding is neatly arranged for a clean, contemporary aesthetic. The bed sits on short, sturdy legs that are only partially visible beneath the bedding. The overall design is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and a monochromatic color scheme. This bed would be suitable for a bedroom in an urban apartment or loft.
description: A modern double bed with a padded headboard, white comforter, and plush pillows, featuring a minimalist upholstered frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded headboard, two large pillows, and the full width of the comforter draped over the bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the comforter, the depth of the pillows, and the upholstered frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid back of the headboard and the low-profile footboard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of bedding and the structure of the frame and headboard.
